zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Thirning於1334年2月出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾文多福時，她的父親John Thirning16歲，母親Joan12歲。她於1368年與William Vaux II在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾拉斯賀波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1385年8月8日在英國波克夏瓦林福德享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Thirning于1334年2月出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾文多福时，她的父亲John Thirning16岁，母亲Joan12岁。她于1368年与William Vaux II在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾拉斯賀波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1385年8月8日在英国波克夏瓦林福德享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: Thirning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (Devon): topographic name from Middle English thorning ‘dweller by a thorn bush’, from Middle English thorn + -ing ‘man’, a type of locative formation peculiar to Devon.

perhaps also a habitational name from either of two places called Thurning (in Northamptonshire and Norfolk), probably derived from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + the groupname suffix -ingas, or from thorning ‘thorny place’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Thirning was born in February 1334, in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Thirning, was 16 and her mother, Joan, was 12. She married William Vaux II in 1368, in Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 8 August 1385, in Wallingford, Berkshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Thirning est née en février 1334, à Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thirning, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé William Vaux II en 1368, à Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1385, à Wallingford, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Thirning im Februar 1334 in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Thirning 16 und ihre Mutter Joan 12. Sie hat 1368 in Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom William Vaux II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 8. August 1385 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Wallingford, Berkshire, England und wurde in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Thirning è nata il nel febbraio 1334 nel Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Thirning, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Joan, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato William Vaux II nel 1368, nel Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 8 agosto 1385, nel Wallingford, Berkshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Thirningが1334年2月にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエンドバーで生まれた時，父John Thirningは16歳，母Joanは12歳であった。1368年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラスブリーでWilliam Vaux IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1385年8月8日にイギリスバークシュアイアワリングフォードで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Thirning(이)가 1334년 2월 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웬도버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Thirning(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 래스버이에서 William Vaux II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 8월 8일 영국 버크실르 월링퍼드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Thirning nasceu em fevereiro de 1334, em Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Thirning, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com William Vaux II em 1368, em Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1385, em Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Thirning родилась февраль 1334 г. в местности вендовир, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Thirning было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Vaux II в 1368 г. в местности латбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 8 августа 1385 г. в местности валлингфорд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Thirning nació en febrero de 1334, en Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Thirning, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 12 años. Se casó con William Vaux II en 1368, en Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1385, en Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
